seo.title: Merge PDF - Free online PDF combiner
seo.description: Merge multiple PDF files in your browser, reorder them, and create one PDF for applications, attachments, or study material.

lead: Select multiple PDFs, reorder them in the browser, and create one combined file.

strings.heroLead: Combine multiple PDFs into one file in the order you need. Selected file contents are read by the current browser for lightweight document cleanup.
strings.dropLead: Drop at least two PDFs here, or choose files with the button.
strings.emptyList: Added PDFs will appear here. You can drag to reorder or use move buttons.
strings.largeFileTip: Large PDFs may use more browser memory. Close other heavy tabs before processing important files.
strings.optionsTitle: Review order and build the result
strings.optionsLead: Confirm the file order before merging, then open the result to check page count and content.
strings.resultLead: The generated result will appear here.
strings.faqOneQuestion: Are files uploaded to a server?
strings.faqOneAnswer: The tool is designed for the browser to read selected PDF contents and create the result. The page may still load site assets, analytics, or advertising requests.
strings.faqTwoQuestion: What should I check after merging?
strings.faqTwoAnswer: Before submitting the file, reopen the result and check order, page count, orientation, and target-platform requirements.
